arts.ttl: Man United wonderkid Chido Obi 'one of five academy players' in Red Devils squad for Tottenham showdown
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim allegedly includes five academy players, including Chido Obi, in his travelling squad for Sunday's Premier League clash with Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford rubs salt into Ruben Amorim's wounds after Man Utd injury blow
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford played a part in Aston Villa's equaliser against Ipswich Town, piling the misery on Manchester United following news that Amad could be out for the season

arts.ttl: Arsenal to compete with Tottenham for Brazilian attacker with 22-G/A this season
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham are keen on signing the Brazilian attacker Igor Paixao from Feyenoord. The 24-year-old has done quite well for the Dutch outfit this season, and he has impressed with his performance in the Champions League as well. He has been linked with Liverpool recently. arts.ttl: Manchester United hit by injury crisis in training ahead of Tottenham showdown
arts.sum: Three United midfielders picked up injuries in training this week

arts.ttl: Man United will live to regret Rashford decision as exciting ace expected to be sidelined for the season
arts.sum: Man United’s decision to allow Marcus Rashford to leave could come back to haunt them after Amad Diallo was seriously injured in training. The England international had become persona non grata for Ruben Amorim, with the Portuguese sending Rashford a brutal message ahead of his exit. arts.ttl: ‘Fantastic’: Shaun Wright-Phillips says one Tottenham player has actually been brilliant recently

arts.ttl: Liverpool looking to sign £33m-rated La Liga star on Man United radar
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United are keen on signing the Spanish defender Dani Vivian at the end of the season. The Athletic Club Bilbao defender has attracted the attention of top European clubs with his performances, and he could cost around €40 million (£33m) due to a release clause in his contract. arts.ttl: How does Daniel Levy run Tottenham - and would he ever leave?
arts.sum: With Tottenham struggling on the pitch and chairman Daniel Levy facing criticism from fans, BBC Sport looks at how the club is run and what the future might hold.

arts.ttl: Player reveals concrete interest from Arsenal and Manchester United early in career – Chose different career path

arts.ttl: Man United star Amad Diallo could be out for the SEASON after suffering injury in training - as Ruben Amorim is hit with devastating blow
arts.sum: It's understood that Diallo was hurt in training and now faces a lengthy lay-off that could keep him out of action for the foreseeable future.
